hero.headline: The finest version|of you,|with surgical precision.
hero.subhead: {doctorName}, {doctorTitle} at {clinic}. Private care at {hospital}, natural outcomes and high-specialty technique.

about.title: Facial and body surgery guided by high-specialty aesthetic judgment.
paragraphs: {doctorName} combines advanced surgical technique with individualized planning for realistic, harmonious outcomes.
Every protocol in my practice prioritizes safety, ethics and close follow-up from consultation through full recovery.
about.quote: Excellent aesthetic surgery does not change who you are; it reveals who you have always been.

procedures.title: Procedures designed for sophisticated, natural-looking outcomes.
procedures.subtitle: Facial and body options tailored to each patient's anatomy and goals.

rinoplastia.name: Rhinoplasty
rinoplastia.description: Functional and aesthetic refinement to improve proportion, breathing and facial balance.

blefaroplastia.name: Blepharoplasty
blefaroplastia.description: Eye contour rejuvenation for a rested, precise and refreshed expression.

lifting-facial.name: Facelift
lifting-facial.description: Tissue repositioning to restore firmness and definition while preserving natural identity.

liposuccion.name: Liposuction
liposuccion.description: Selective body sculpting to refine silhouette transitions with controlled precision.

mamoplastia-aumento.name: Breast Augmentation
mamoplastia-aumento.description: Customized projection and volume planning based on anatomy and aesthetic intent.

abdominoplastia.name: Abdominoplasty
abdominoplastia.description: Abdominal tightening with contour restoration and core support improvement.

otoplastia.name: Otoplasty
otoplastia.description: Conservative ear reshaping to harmonize form and position.

mentoplastia.name: Mentoplasty
mentoplastia.description: Chin definition designed to balance lower facial proportions.

whyUs.title: Clinical confidence at every stage of care.

items.label: International Certification
items.copy: Protocols aligned with global standards in surgical safety and ethical practice.

items.label: Advanced Technology
items.copy: Planning, operating room and recovery supported by contemporary surgical systems.

items.label: Personalized Care
items.copy: Dedicated one-to-one guidance before, during and after each procedure.

items.label: Natural Results
items.copy: Realistic goals that preserve facial and body identity with refined enhancement.
